agent.name: Coach Spike
agent.description: Chat-first personal trainer agent with a companion dashboard for progress, plan state, and adherence trends

secrets.name: APP_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Lightweight dashboard password. Defaults to changeme if unset.

secrets.name: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN
secrets.description: Bearer token for the protected OpenClaw gateway.

secrets.name: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_URL
secrets.description: Optional OpenClaw gateway base URL override.
